name: testRefundDialogDisplaysCorrectTextAndAmount
description: All refundable transactions display correct refund dialog text and pre-filled refund amount.
descriptionHtml: All refundable transactions display correct refund dialog text and pre-filled refund amount.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0710.175845.23.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field

parameters.name: userEmail
parameters.value: 0710.175845.23.super@email.com

steps.name: Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

parameters.name: email
parameters.value: 0710.175845.23.super@email.com

parameters.name: password
parameters.value: Qwerty123!

testStage.description: All refundable transactions display correct refund dialog text and pre-filled refund amount.

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' menu in Header
Set start and end date: 10-07-2025 to 10-07-2025
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter

parameters.name: companyName
parameters.value: CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter

parameters.name: businessUnitName
parameters.value: MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.

steps.name: Click 'Refund transaction'

parameters.name: row
parameters.value: Locator@internal:role=row >> internal:has-not-text="No rows to display."i >> internal:has-not="internal:role=columnheader" >> nth=0

steps.name: Verify: refund dialog header is correct
Verify: refund message contains correct max amount and currency
Verify: refund amount input is pre-filled with correct value
Verify: increase amount button to refund is disabled
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
Click 'Refund transaction'
